versions.version_description: 80’s pop dance feel. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. The entire song really revolves around the 4 chord movement of the intro, but the pre-chorus is a bit more airy and mystical feeling. Solo acts as a bridge. Choruses play as intro. Outro plays as chorus with a quick fade out after the last words.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab]Publicidade              [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] 
Why am I        stand-in' on a cloud [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch] 
Every time     you're a-round [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] 
And my sad-ness dis-ap-pears [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch] 
Every time   you  are  near [/tab]
 
{Bridge:} 
 
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch] 
         You must  be an an-gel [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch] 
I can see    it in      your eyes [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch] 
Full of wonder and  sur-prise [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 
And just now  I  re-al-ize [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch] 
        Oooh         you're an an-gel [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch] 
        Oooh         you're an an-gel [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch] 
        Oooh         you're an an-gel [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch] 
In dis-guise,        I can see it in your eyes      [/tab]
Walking down a crowded avenue 
Other faces seem like nothing next to you 
And I can't hear the traffic rushing by 
Just the pounding of my heart and that's why 
 
 
{bridge} 
{Chorus, repeat} 
 
 
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch] 
                 You're an an-gel [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch] 
                 You're an an-gel, baby [/tab]
 
 
 
 
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch] 
                 You're an an-gel [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch] 
         You must  be an an-gel [/tab]
 
[tab]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch] 
Now  I       be-lieve  that dreams come true [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch] 
'Cause you   came when  I  wished for you [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch] 
This just   can't   be    co-in-cidence [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch] 
The only   way  that this makes sense is that [/tab]
 
{Chorus, repeat}
